qas.q: T/F AIRFORCE MEMBERS MAY WEAR DISTINCTIVE UNIFORM ITEMS WITH CIVILIAN CLOTHES, SUCH AS GRADE INSIGNIA, RIBBONS, CAP DEVICES, BADGES, UNIFORM JACKETS (NOT TO INCLUDE PT JACKET) AND OTHER AIR FORCE INSIGNIAS
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT AN ITEM INCLUDED IN THE MESS DRESS UNIFORM?
T/F NAIL POLISH IS AUTHORIZED FOR MALES
T/F ITEMS TO BE CARRIED OR WORN,M SUCH AS BRIEF CASES, GYM BAGS, BACK PACKS, AND PURSES, WILL MEET SIZE, COLOR, PROPER WEAR, RESTRICTIONS, AND OTHER SPECIFICATIONS, AS APPROPRIATE.
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT ONE OF THE FIVE MANDATORY BADGES FOR ABUS
AS A RULE, AIRFORCE MEMBERS MUST WEAR THE APPROPRIATE UNIFORM WHILE PERFORMING MILITARY DUTIES. WHAT WILL MEMBERS WEAR WHEN ASSIGNED TO NON-AIR FORCE ORGANIZATION?
HOW ARE THE LONG SLEEVED ABU SHIRT SLEEVES WORN WHEN ROLLED UP?
qas.a: CUFFS WILL REMAIN VISIBLE, SLEEVES WILL REST AT, OR COME WITHIN ONE INCH OF, THE FOREARM WHEN THE ARM IS BENT 90-DEGREE ANGLE

qas.q: WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT AN ACCOUTREMENT (PATCH) THAT IS INCLUDED FOR THE BASIC FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM (FDU) AND DESERT FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM (DFDU)

THERE IS NO ENTIRE LIST ADDRESSING ALL ITEMS AND ACCESSORIES THAT ARE INAPPROPRIATE OR UNACCEPTABLE WHEN WEARING THE AIR-FORCE UNIFORM. AS A RULE, WHICH ACCESSORIES ARE NOT AUTHORIZED FOR WEAR UNLESS SPECIFICALLY AUTHORIZED BY THE AF AS A CHANGE POLICY?
T/F AUTHORIZED HEAD GEAR WILL ALWAYS BE WORN WHILE OUTDOORS, REGARDLESS OF ANY CIRCUMSTANCES
WHAT DOES A MEMBER DO DURING REVEILLE AND RETREAT WHEN WEARING PT GEAR?
qas.a: COMES TO FULL ATTENTION AND RENDERS THE PROPER SALUTE WHEN OUTDOORS

qas.q: DEEPLY ROOTED IN OUR AIRFORCE HERRITAGE, WHAT PROVIDES VISIBLE EXAMPLES OF SELF-DISCIPLINE, COMMITMENT, AND WILLINGNESS TO SET ASIDE INDIVIDUALITY FOR THE BETTERMENT OF THE WHOLE?

T/F WHILE OFF DUTY, IN CIVILIAN ATTIRE, ON OR OFF A MILITARY INSTALLATION, ONLY WITH THE EXCEPTION OF EARINGS, ALL MEMBERS ARE PROHIBITED FROM ATTACHING, AFFIXING, OR DISPLAYING OBJECTS, ARTICLES, JEWELRY OR ORNAMENTATION TO OR THROUGH THE EARS, NOSE, TONGUE, EYE BROWS, LIPS, OR ANY EXPOSED BODY PARTS
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT ONE OF THE FOUR REQUIREMENTS FOR WIGS, HAIRPIECES, AND EXTENSIONS FOR BOTH MEN AND WOMEN?
qas.a: WIGS MAY BE USED TO COVER UNAUTHORIZED HAIRSTYLES

qas.q: WHICH UNIFORM IS DESERT TAN AND WORN DURING CONTINGENCIES, EXERCISE, DEPLOYMENTS AND TACTICAL TRAINING OPERATIONS, AS APPROPRIATE FOR ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS AND AS AUTHORIZED?
T/F MEN MAY WEAR EARRINGS OUT OF UNIFORM
WHY ARE DRESS AND PERSONAL APPEARANCES ESTABLISHED?
qas.a: TO ENSURE EVERY AIRMAN REFLECTS PRIDE IN PERSONAL APPEARANCE, PROFESSIONALISM, AND ESPRIT DE CORPS

qas.q: WHEN USING FREQUENT FLYER MILES TO UPGRADE TO BUSSINESS OR FIRST CLASS, WHY MAY AIRFORCE MEMBERS NOT WEAR MILITARY UNIFORMS, EVEN WHEN AN UPGRADE IS LEGITIMATE?
qas.a: WEARING OF THE UNIFORM MAY CREATE THE PUBLIC PERCEPTION OF THE MISUES OF GOVERNMENT TRAVEL RESOURCES AND SHOULD BE AVOIDED UNDER THESE CIRCUMSTANCES`

qas.q: WHICH DUTY INCLUDES PREPARATION, PREFLIGHT, INFLIGHT, POST FLIGHT, AND OTHER FLIGHT RELATED DUTIES ASSOCIATED WITH AIRCRAFT OPERATIONS
T/F WEAR OR USE OF ANY EARPIECE, ANY BLUE TOOTH TECHNOLOGY, OR HEADPHONES WHILE IN UNIFORM, INDOORS, OR OUTDOORS, IS PROHIBITED, UNLESS SPECIFICALLY AUTHORIZED FOR THE EXECUTION OF OFFICIAL DUTIES
which of the following is not one of the four requirements for men's facial hair?
qas.a: IF AUTHORIZED BY THE COMMANDER, MEMBERS MUST KEEP FACIAL HAIR TRIMMED NOT TO EXCEED 1/3 INCH IN LENGTH; AND WILL SHAVE FACIAL HAIR IN A MANNER AS TO GIVE A SCULPTURED APPEARANCE.

qas.q: WORN OR DAMAGED UNIFORMS WILL NOT BE WORN. IF TH E ITEMS ARE MANDATORY UNIFORMS ITEMS, AIRMEN WILL PROCURE AND MAINTAIN ALL MANDATORY CLOTHING ITEMS LISTED IN WHICH AFI?
qas.a: AFI 36-3014, CLOTHING ALLOWANCES FOR AIRFORCE PERSONNEL

qas.q: T/F RELIGIUOS ITEMS AND APPAREL WILL BE WORN ACCORDING TO SPECIFICATIONS IN AFI 36-2903, AND AS APPROVED BY INSTALLATION COMMANDERS, IF NECESSARY.
T/F SUPERVISORS MAY AUTHORIZE WEAR OF STANDARDIZE COLOR MORALE T-SHIRTS ON FRIDAYS DURING PT OR DURING SPECIAL EVENTS.
T/F ACCOUTREMENTS FOR THE ABUS INCLUDE, APPROPRIATE RANK, US AIRFORCE TAPE, NAMETAPE AND BADGES
WHICH BADGE IS NOT MANDATORY OF THE MESS DRESS UNIFORM?
T/F ABU SHIRT MAY BE REMOVIED ANYTIME IN THE IMMEDIATE WORK AREA
WHY DOES PRESENTING A PROFESSIONAL IMAGE MATTER AS MUCH AS PROFESSIONAL BEHAVIOR WHEN IT COMES TO BEING A MILITARY MEMBER?
qas.a: ACCORDING TO AFI-1-1, AIRFORCE STANDARDS, FIRST IMPRESSIONS ARE OFTEN DRAWN BASED UPON APPEARANCES

qas.q: WHICH COMMANDERS WILL ENSURE NAME TAGS ON BASIC FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORMS AND DESERT FLIGHT DUTY UNIFROM ARE IN GOOD TASTE AND REFLECT PROPER MILITARU ORDER, DISCIPLINE, MORALE, AND IMAGE?
WHICH AFI PROVIDES DETAILS REGARDING THE AIRFORCE UNIFORMS?
T/F THERE ARE NO ACCOUTREMENTS WITH PHYSICAL TRAINING GEAR, BUT THERE ARE A NUMBER OF AUTHORIZED VARIATIONS OF UNIFORMS THAT MAY BE WORN TO ACCOMODATE WEATHER AND SAFETY CONDITIONS
WHAT US DEFINED AS PICTURES DESIGNS, OR OTHER MARKINGS AS A RESULT OF USING MEANS OTHER THAN BURNING TO PERMANENTLY SCAR OR MARK THE SKIN?
T/F ACCOUTREMENTS FOR THE OCP UNIFORM INCLUDE ONLY, APPROPRIATE RANK, US AIRFORCE TAPE, NAMETAPE, BADGES
WHICH COLOR IS THE SURVIVAL, EVASION, RESISTANCE ESCAPE TEAM BERETS?
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT ONE OF THE SIX REQUIREMENTS REGARDING FINGERNAILS?
qas.a: WHEN WORN, WOMEN MAY WEAR MULTICOLOR NAIL POLISH THAT DOES NOT DISTINCTLY CONTRASTS WITH THE COMPLEXION OR DETRACT FROM THE UNIFORM

qas.q: T/F TATTOOS, BRAND, OR BODY MARKINGS ANYWHERE ON THE BODY THAT ARE OBSCENE, COMMONLY ASSOSIATED WITH GANGS, EXTREMISTS, AND/OR SUPREMACIST ORGANIZATIONS, OR THAT ADVOCATE SEXUAL, RACIAL, ETHNIC, OR RELIGIOUS DISCRIMINATION, ARE PROHIBITED ONLY WHILE IN UNIFORM
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT WORN BY MILITARY PERSONNEL FOR SPECIFIC SOCIAL OR OFFICIAL FUNCTIONS?
IF THE MEMBER HAS MULTIPLE PEIRCINGS IN HER EAR, WHERE ON THE EARS IS SHE AUTHORIZED TO WEAR ONLY ONE SET OF EARINGS?
WHICH AFI IS TITLED DRESS AND PERSONAL APPEARANCE OF AIR FORCE PERSONNEL?
WHERE ARE THE MANDATORY AERONAUTICAL BADGE, SPACE, CYBERSPACE, OR MISSILE OPERATIONS BADGE (IF AWARDED) EMBROIDERED ON THE BASIC FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM AND DESERT FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM?
qas.a: ABOVE THE NAME ON THE NAMETAG

qas.q: MEMBERS OF HONOR GAURD, BAND RECRUITERS, CHAPLAINS, FITNESS CENTER STAFF WORLD CLASS ATHLETES, AND ENLISTED AIDES ARE AUTHORIZED TO WEAR WHAT UNIFORMS?
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT AMONG THE ITEMS THE SERVICE DRESS UNIFOMR (CLASS A) CONSISTS OF?
qas.a: LIGHT BLUE LONG SLEEVED SHIRT/BLOUSE ONLY PLAIN CHEVON TIE (MEN) OR TIE TAB (WOMEN)

qas.q: T/F HEAD GEAR IS NOT WORN WITH THE MESS DRESS UNIFORM, BUT SALUTING IS REQUIRED
T/F MESS DRESS AND SEMIFORMAL SERVICE DRESS ARE OPTIONAL UNIFORMS FOR ENLISTED PERSONNEL
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING ACCOUTREMENTS IS NOT INCLUDED FOR THE MESS DRESS UNIFORM?
T/F A NAMETAG IS WORN WITH THE MESS DRESS UNIFORM?
WHAT ARE OPTIONAL ACCOUTREMENTS FOR THE WOMEN'S MESS DRESS UNIFORM?
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT AN ITEM INCLUDED IN BASIC AIRMAN BATTLE UNIFORM?
T/F SQUADRON COMMANDERS MAY AUTHORIZE WEAR OF STANDARDIZED COLOR MORALE TSHIRTS ON FRIDAY OR DURING SPECIAL EVENTS
T/F THE BASIC OCP UNIFORM CONSIST OF THE SHIRT, TROUSERS, LONG OR SHORT SLEEVED DESERT SAND T-SHIRT, TAN RIGGER BELT, SOCKS, BOOTS, AND WHEN OUTDOORS APPROPRIATE HEADGEAR
T/F OCP UNIFORMS ARE NOT A WASH AND WEAR UNIFORM. IRONING, LIGHT STARTCHING, OR HOT PRESSING IS AUTHORIZED.
T/F CHAPLAIN BADGE IS MANDATORY ON THE OCP UNIFORM
T/F THE OCP SHIRT MAY BE REMOVED IN THE IMMEDIATE WORK AREA AS DETERMINED APPROPRIATE BY LOCAL LEADERHSIP
WHICH OF THE FOLLOWING IS NOT AN ITEM TTHE BASIC PHYSCIAL TRAINING GEAR CONSIST OF?
qas.a: SHORT- OR LONG SLEEVE T SHIRTS

qas.q: T/F WEAR OF THE PT GEAR IS MANDATORY DURING PT ASSESMENTS AND WHILE PARTICIPATING IN ORGANIZED PT EVENTS AS DESIGNATED BY THE COMMANDER
T/F PT GEAR IS NOT AN OFFICIAL AF UNIFORM
T/F SALUTING INDIVIDUALS DUE TO RANK RECOGNITION IS NOT REQUIRED WHEN WEARING THE PTG, BUT MAY BE EXPECTED DURING SPECIFIED ACADEMIC TRAINING ENVIRONMENTS
WHICH UNIFORM IS TYPICALLY REFERRED TO AS THE FLIGHT SUIT AND IS SAGE GREEN?

WHICH UNIFORMS ARE AUTHORZED FUNCTIONAL CLOTHING FOR WEAR BY INDIVIDUALS WHO PERFORM FLYING, PARACHUTIS, AND SPACE AND MISSILE CREW DUTIES OR THOSE PERFORMING OPERATIONS SUPPORT/NON-INTERFERENCE FLYER DUTIES WHEN ACTUAL FLYING IS PLANNED OR ANTICIPATED.
qas.a: FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM (FDU) AND DESERT FLIGHT DUTY UNIFORM (DFDU)

qas.q: WHAT ENHANCES TH ESPRIT DECORPS AND THE PROFESSIONAL IMAGES ESSENTIAL TO AN EFFECTIVE MILITARY FORCE?
qas.a: PRIDE IN ONE'S PERSONAL APPEARANCE AND PROPER WEAR OF THE UNIFORM

qas.q: T/F WHEN IN UNIFORM, DO NOT SMOKE OR USE SMOKELESS TOBACCO PRODUCTS EXCEPT WHEN AUTHORIZED IN DESIGNATED SMOKING AREAS
AIRFORCE STANDARDS OF DRESS AND PERSONAL APPEARANCE CONSISTS OF FIVE ELEMENTS. WHAT ARE THEY?
qas.a: NEATNESS, CLEANLINESS, SAFETY, UNIFORMITY, AND MILITARY IMAGE
